case_title: STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY VS. PACIFIC PARKING SERVICE et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT PACIFIC PARKING SERVICE SOLDANO, JOSEPH DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR OCT-02-2009 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-31-2009 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         SEP-17-2009
MINI-MINUTES FOR SEP-01-2009 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF
AFTER HEARING, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR. (212) PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: JOYCE LONG, CSR#8620. (212)
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR DEC-21-2009. NOV-25-2009 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PURSUANT TO CRC 3.827 (A), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PACIFIC PARKING SERVICE SOLDANO, JOSEPH $3,688.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,688.00, STATUTORY COSTS OF SUIT ARE: AWARDED TO PLAINTIFF(S) STATE FARM INSURANCE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT PACIFIC PARKING SERVICE SOLDANO, JOSEPH

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-25-2009 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE OCT-02-2009 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT & COMPLAINT; ADR PKG; NTC TO PLTFS; MEDIATION SERVICES PAMPHLET; CMS (BLANK); AND JUDICIAL MEDIATION PRGM INFO SHEET, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY SERVED AUG-31-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PACIFIC PARKING SERVICE
ARBITRATOR ARTHUR CHARLES LIPTON APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION DEC-21-2009 THROUGH MAR-21-2010.

ARBITRATOR'S FEE STATEMENT SENT TO ACCOUNTING FOR LIPTON, ARTHUR CHARLES
AMENDED AWARD FILED BY ARBITRATOR

REMOVED FROM ARBITRATION. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON JUL-09-2010 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212 FOR JUDGMENT, DISMISSAL OR TRIAL DE NOVO. IF FILED, APPEARANCES ARE WAIVED. MAY-04-2010 ARBITRATION OSC IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
